title: Future occurrence setup
description: Choose which event definitions should be applied when new occurrences are created.
definition_only_description: This never copies attendees, registrations, attendance, payments, reminders, analytics or delivery history, and it never changes existing occurrences.
effective_from_help: This stable identity belongs to the selected occurrence. It is not recalculated from a changed start time.
sections_description: Every section is explicit. Staff assignments are never selected automatically.

agenda.label: Agenda
agenda.description: Scheduled sessions, speakers and protected resource definitions.

ticket_types.label: Ticket types
ticket_types.description: Free or draft ticket-type definitions and their sales windows.

registration.label: Registration
registration.description: Registration settings and the currently published form.

safety.label: Safety requirements
safety.description: The currently published safety and eligibility requirements.

staff.label: Staff assignments
staff.description: High-risk opt-in: carry active staff roles into future new occurrences.

section_not_permitted: Your event role cannot carry this section forward.
no_sections_description: A preview is required before any future setup can be saved.
preview_description: Review the bounded counts and conflicts before opening the confirmation step.

conflicts.definition_limit_exceeded: {{section}} exceeds the safe definition limit ({{count}} found).
conflicts.speaker_limit_exceeded: The agenda exceeds the safe speaker limit ({{count}} found).
conflicts.invalid_speaker_reference: The agenda contains {{count}} invalid speaker reference.
conflicts.resource_limit_exceeded: The agenda exceeds the safe resource limit ({{count}} found).
conflicts.unsupported_active_time_credit_ticket: {{count}} active time-credit ticket type cannot be carried forward.
conflicts.published_form_missing: The published registration form could not be verified.
conflicts.question_limit_exceeded: The published form exceeds the safe question limit ({{count}} found).
conflicts.published_requirement_version_missing: The published safety requirement version could not be verified.
conflicts.invalid_staff_reference: {{count}} staff assignment refers to an unavailable member.
conflicts.nonportable_staff_expiry: {{count}} staff assignment expires before the future occurrence and cannot be carried forward.

counts.none: No definitions were found in the selected sections.

preview_error.title: Preview could not be prepared
preview_error.description: Check the selected definitions and try again.

preview_expired.title: Preview expired
preview_expired.description: Refresh the preview before confirming. Nothing has been saved.

preview_stale.title: Definitions changed after preview
preview_stale.description: Prepare a new preview so the confirmation reflects the latest definitions.

commit_conflict.title: Future setup was not saved
commit_conflict.description: Another version or a conflicting request was saved first. Refresh the preview and review it again.

commit_error.title: Future setup could not be saved
commit_error.description: Your stable retry key has been kept. Try confirming again, or refresh the preview if it has expired.

success_created_description: Immutable definition version {{version}} will apply only to newly created future occurrences.
success_replay_description: Version {{version}} matches this retry. No duplicate version was created.
history_description: Each saved definition version is retained with bounded counts and its effective recurrence identity.
history_error_description: Try again to retrieve the immutable versions.
history_empty_description: A version will appear here after a preview is confirmed.
load_more_error_title: More versions could not be loaded
load_more_error_description: Try loading the next page again.
confirm_scope_description: This version takes effect from the displayed recurrence identity. Existing occurrences and participant records are not changed.
staff_risk_description: Active staff roles may grant operational access on every newly created occurrence. Review this opt-in carefully.
confirm_ack: I confirm this future-only definition version
confirm_ack_description: I reviewed the selected sections, counts, conflicts and effective recurrence identity.
